rooms.name: Central Clearing
rooms.description: A small clearing of packed grey earth, maybe thirty paces across, ringed by the absolute black of the void. Faint green-gold light pulses up through cracks in the ground where the world seed's roots run shallow. The air is warm and still. Paths of beaten dirt lead outward in four directions.
aspects: The Ground Hums With Something Alive

rooms.name: Basic Shelter
rooms.description: A low lean-to of dull grey hull plating lashed to bent girders, its seams stuffed with torn fabric. The interior is dim and cramped — room for a few bedrolls on packed earth. Gaps in the walls let in slivers of void-dark, and the ceiling is low enough to brush with an outstretched hand.

rooms.name: The Hollow
rooms.description: A bowl-shaped depression in the rock, a few meters deep, where the world seed has taken root. Pale green light pulses from a tangle of luminous roots at the bottom, casting shifting leaf-shadow patterns on the stone walls. The air here is warmer and faintly humid, and the light intensifies when you draw close.

rooms.name: The Junkyard
rooms.description: A rough clearing heaped with salvage — dull metal scraps in one pile, tangles of copper wire in another, torn fabric bundled and weighted with stones. The ground is stained with rust and oil. Everything is sorted into rough categories, marked with scratched labels on flat pieces of hull plating.
aspects: One Person's Trash Is Another's Foundation

rooms.name: Landing Pad
rooms.description: The skerry's edge, where grey rock crumbles into nothing. The void stretches in every direction — absolute black broken by four distant lights. South, the cold metallic glint of a debris field. East, soft blue-green bioluminescence. West, the icy glitter of a frozen hull. Above, a warm green shimmer. The ground here is worn smooth by departing and returning feet.
aspects: One Step Further and You're in the Nothing

expandable_rooms.name: Storehouse
expandable_rooms.description: A squat structure of riveted hull plating and lashed beams, its doorway hung with a fabric curtain. Inside, rough wooden shelves line every wall, loaded with crates and bundles sorted by type. Labels in precise handwriting mark each section. The air smells of resin and dry metal.

expandable_rooms.name: Workshop
expandable_rooms.description: A roofed workspace built from angled hull plating, open on one side. A heavy workbench dominates the center, its surface scarred with tool marks and burn rings. Wrenches, pliers, and hammers hang from pegs on the back wall. Metal filings dust the ground.
aspects: The Right Tool for Any Job

expandable_rooms.name: Garden
expandable_rooms.description: A patch of dark, turned earth divided into four raised plots, each bordered with flat stones. The soil is rich and damp, threaded with fine luminous root-hairs from the world seed below. Faint green-gold light seeps up between the furrows. A low fence of lashed sticks marks the garden's boundary.

expandable_rooms.name: Water Collection
expandable_rooms.description: A circular array of pale crystal shards, each the length of a forearm, angled to catch the void-mist that drifts across the skerry. Condensation trickles down their facets into a shallow stone basin. The crystals hum faintly and refract light into faint rainbows across the wet rock.
aspects: Pure Water in a Place That Has None

expandable_rooms.name: Apothecary
expandable_rooms.description: A sheltered alcove walled with salvaged plating, its floor swept clean and covered with woven fabric mats. Bundles of dried moss and rolled bandages hang from hooks along one wall. A low cot sits against the back, its frame lashed together from bent metal. The air smells faintly of resin and something medicinal.
aspects: A Place to Mend What the Void Breaks

expandable_rooms.name: Lookout Post
expandable_rooms.description: A raised platform of dark ancient alloy, bolted together and braced with wire stays. It stands twice a person's height above the skerry, reached by a crude ladder. From the top, the void spreads in every direction — black and limitless, broken only by the distant glow of the four nodes.
aspects: See Trouble Coming From Miles Away
